opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face suddenly turned bright red after I was in the garden today, it feels like it's burning, and I'm terrified my lupus is attacking my organs.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The redness came on really fast this afternoon after I was out in the sun and it's hot and stinging — I'm scared it means something serious is happening inside me.

symptom_narrative.onset: this afternoon, coming on over about 4 hours after I was out gardening in the sun
symptom_narrative.duration: about 4 hours and it's still there
symptom_narrative.character: hot, burning and tight — like my skin is stinging
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the burning feels intense and it's really upsetting me, but I can still do everything normally
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across both my cheeks and over the top of my nose
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on after being in the sun and has stayed since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: I haven't found anything that helps yet
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it seemed to flare up while I was out in the afternoon sun
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mostly I'm just really anxious about it — I don't have a fever that I can tell, I'm breathing fine and my chest is okay
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had my face go red like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still move around and do things normally, I'm just frightened

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I was told a few years ago that I have a positive ANA blood test and possible lupus, but I've never actually had any symptoms from it until now
past_medical_history.how_managed: no treatment — I was just told to keep an eye on it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: I'm not taking any regular medications

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I was gardening outside this afternoon without sunscreen or a hat. I tend to get very anxious about my health.

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants urgent reassurance that this is not a life-threatening internal organ crisis

objective_data_offered.value: both cheeks and the bridge of the nose look bright red and flushed
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-shown over chat/photo; lighting and colour rendering unreliable, and the exact distribution/sparing cannot be judged remotely

objective_data_offered.value: 36.9 degrees on my thermometer at home
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: I don't feel like I have a fever, my breathing is normal, my chest doesn't hurt and I'm passing urine normally
